CreateRegionBandwidth.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateRegionBandwidth.localRegion: Local region of the regional bandwidth; represents the cloud-side region in cloud-edge interconnection scenarios
CreateRegionBandwidth.peerRegion: Peer region of the regional bandwidth; represents the edge-side region in cloud-edge interconnection scenarios
CreateRegionBandwidth.bandwidth: Bandwidth value of the regional bandwidth
